headline: Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Could Be 17.8% Overvalued After Fresh Results
summary: Airbnb (ABNB) is in focus for investors as its latest reported figures show revenue of US$12.65b and net income of US$2.52b. These results are drawing renewed attention to how the stock’s valuation compares with its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Airbnb. The share price of Airbnb is US$141.20, with a 1-day share price return of 1.61% and a 7-day share price return of 9.37%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 6.83% and 3-year total shareholder return of 10.78% point to...

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Google And Meta May Have The Most To Lose In The AI‑Agent Era, Says Founder Who Rejected OpenAI
summary: Google, Meta, Uber and Airbnb face disruption from AI agents, while Nvidia, TSMC and Qualcomm remain the safest AI investments, says AGI founder who rejected OpenAI

headline: Will Airbnb (ABNB) Turn Lower Flight Costs Into a Stronger Platform Advantage?
summary: In its 2026 Annual Meeting held on 5 June, Airbnb elected Alfred Lin as a Class III director for a three-year term and reported that shareholders voted down proposals on charitable discrimination reporting, digital services risk oversight, and a dual-class share sunset. At the same time, easing geopolitical tensions and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are expected to lower flight costs and potentially lift travel activity flowing through platforms like Airbnb. We’ll now examine how...
